title: PlatformObservation
description: Engine-neutral record of a single observation captured from an AEO engine (v1: ChatGPT Search only). chatgpt-observer-service is the first implementation (ADR-0007) — a second engine reuses this same contract with a different engine_id value, no core rework. Raw response/screenshot content is never carried inline, only an object reference.
$comment: compat_class: closed, signed: false (non-signed closed contract, ADR-0024(b) family). Authority: docs/architecture/contract-catalog.md P1 table row 'PlatformObservation | chatgpt-observer (첫 구현체 — 계약은 엔진 중립, engine_id 필수, ADR-0007) | raw는 object ref만; customer+ToS, encrypted'; ADR-0007 (engine-neutral contract, chatgpt-observer first implementation); ADR-0013 (engine_id v1 closed enum, chatgpt-search only); services/acquisition/chatgpt-observer-service/README.md ('PlatformObservation (observation.py): ... raw_object_ref (never raw captured content) and citation_refs (zero citations is a valid signal, never rejected) — this service's own engine-neutral capture shape ..., not the eventual formal P1 PlatformObservation contract itself (no packages/contracts schema exists for it yet)' — this unit lands that formal contract). Field names (raw_object_ref, citation_refs) are chosen to match the service's own existing local model verbatim, per the README's own field-naming precedent, easing the service's eventual migration onto this formal contract. artifact_hash is the sole ledger anchor tying this record back to event/observation-captured.artifact_hash (same event/domain split as repo.intaken.v1 vs domain/source-snapshot). citation_refs uses uri_ref (query/fragment forbidden) and minItems:0 (zero citations is schema-valid, never rejected, per the README precedent). Encryption-at-rest (contract-catalog.md 'encrypted') is a runtime/storage-layer obligation, not schema-expressible from field shapes alone (same pattern as SourceSnapshot's secret-scan gate).

engine_id.$comment: ADR-0007/ADR-0013 — engine-neutral contract, engine_id required, v1 closed enum ['chatgpt-search']. References the engine-id root type directly (this field IS the engine_id value), mirrors context/run-context-experiment/v1#/properties/engine_id usage.

observation_id.$comment: Opaque identifier for this observation capture, mirrors common/identifiers/v1 opaque-id shape but not promoted there.

raw_object_ref.$comment: services/acquisition/chatgpt-observer-service/README.md 'raw_object_ref (never raw captured content)' — object reference only, query/fragment forbidden (ADR-0024(f)).

artifact_hash.$comment: Content-addressed hash of the captured artifact/snapshot — the same hash event/observation-captured.artifact_hash carries as its sole ledger anchor (event/domain split mirrors repo.intaken.v1 vs domain/source-snapshot).

citation_refs.$comment: services/acquisition/chatgpt-observer-service/README.md 'citation_refs (zero citations is a valid signal, never rejected)' — minItems:0 allows an empty array, always present (required).
